# Therr App — Local Business Directory & Community Platform

> Therr is a local-first community app and business directory. We help people discover nearby businesses, restaurants, events, and places of interest.

## Site Purpose

Therr.com is a public local business directory with listings across major US cities. Each business listing (called a "space") includes structured data such as:

- Business name and description
- Street address, city, state, postal code
- GPS coordinates (latitude/longitude)
- Phone number, website URL
- Opening hours
- Food/cuisine type (for restaurants)
- Price range (1-4 scale)
- User ratings and reviews
- Category (restaurant, bar, cafe, shop, hotel, gym, museum, event venue, etc.)

## Public Pages

- **Space detail pages**: `https://www.therr.com/spaces/{spaceId}` — Full business listing with JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema
- **Locations directory**: `https://www.therr.com/locations` — Browsable directory of all public spaces
- **User profiles**: `https://www.therr.com/users/{userId}` — Public user profiles

## Structured Data

All space detail pages include:
- JSON-LD `LocalBusiness` (or `Restaurant`, `BarOrNightClub`, `Store`, etc.) schema
- JSON-LD `BreadcrumbList` schema
- JSON-LD `FAQPage` schema with auto-generated Q&A about hours, location, cuisine, and price
- Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
- `hreflang` links for English (`/spaces/{id}`), Spanish (`/es/spaces/{id}`), and French (`/fr/spaces/{id}`)

## Languages

Content is available in English (default), Spanish (`/es/` prefix), and French Canadian (`/fr/` prefix).

## Data Licensing

Business listing data is sourced from:
- User-contributed content (original to Therr)
- OpenStreetMap (CC BY-SA 2.0) — attributed where applicable
- Public municipal business license registries

## Sitemap

The XML sitemap is available at `https://www.therr.com/sitemap.xml` and includes all public space pages with `hreflang` alternates.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.therr.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/rili-live/therr-app
